issues_found: Source is a listing/container page per SOURCE METADATA and page structure - violates rule #8
URL is blank making source non-locatable
No substantive text content - only titles and dates of individual press releases
Thin low-signal page with no research value as standalone document
Individual macro catalyst items (TAF auctions, FOMC statements, central bank coordination) exist within but require separate archival as individual documents
human_review_reason: Record accurately identifies source limitations; no uncertainty requiring human judgment

corrected_fields.summary: This is a container page listing Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2007. It contains links to hundreds of individual announcements including monetary policy actions, regulatory proposals, enforcement actions, and other administrative matters. The page does not contain the substantive text of any individual release; only titles and dates. Per rule #8, listing pages must not be accepted as archiveable research documents.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This page serves as an index to Federal Reserve communications during 2007, a period significant for macro catalysts including the emergence of subprime mortgage stress, Term Auction Facility (TAF) launches, and coordinated central bank actions. However, the substantive content of these events is not present in this source - individual press releases would require separate archival.
corrected_fields.macro_context: 2007 was a pivotal year for macro catalysts including TAF auctions initiated in December 2007 to address funding market pressures, multiple FOMC statements, and regulatory actions related to subprime mortgage lending. These items are referenced by title/date only in this source.
